new_claims.claim_text: Indian political figures using 'infiltrators' rhetoric to discredit opposition and establish a 'Nation First' principle.
new_claims.notes: Rhetoric observed from @narendramodi and questioned by other users.

new_claims.claim_text: Artemis II mission is 'fake and gay', part of a broader skepticism towards verifiable scientific achievements.
new_claims.notes: Comments on @Rainmaker1973 and @NASA posts exemplify weaponized skepticism.
